svg.text: CockroachDB Leader Leases 三层解耦

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: SIGMOD 2026 · Lease ← Fortification ← Liveness Fabric · CPU 节省 85%+

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ 基于时间的 Leader 授权 · 任期内无需心跳确认

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ 替代传统 Raft heartbeat 的巨大改进: Leader 无需每次操作都等 quorum

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: └ 关键: Lease 的有效期由 Fortification 保证

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ MsgFortifyLeader: 确定性承诺替代心跳超时推测

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ Raft 增强: Leader 获得 Majority 的显式"我不挑战你"承诺

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: └ 与心跳超时的本质区别: 心跳是"假设没出事"→ Fortification 是"确认没出事"

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ 去中心化集群故障检测: 每个节点维护有向 support 关系 (epoch, expiration)

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: ├ 复杂度 O(N_nodes²): 每对节点独立维护双向 support graph

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: └ 输出: 上层 Fortification 可据此判断"多少节点还活着"→ Lease 是否有效

text.font-family: Helvetica Neue, Arial, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 核心影响: CPU 节省 85%+ · Leader Lease 消除每次操作的心跳等待 · 延迟降低 · 吞吐提升
